questions.question: Write a pseudo-code for a depth-first search (DFS) traversal of a graph, starting from a given node. Explain the purpose of the recursive calls in the traversal.
questions.hint: Show a sample graph and explain the traversal order

questions.question: Consider a graph represented as an adjacency list. Describe the time complexity of a depth-first search (DFS) traversal in this representation.
questions.hint: Discuss the implications of the graph representation on the time complexity

questions.question: Implement a depth-first search (DFS) traversal of a binary tree. How do you handle the case when the tree is empty? Provide a sample code snippet.
questions.hint: Use a programming language of your choice and explain the logic behind the DFS traversal
